patient.query: I know I shouldn't tie my worth to how I do, but it’s just so hard. I always feel like I’m not living up to expectations, especially my own. I get really down on myself when I think about failing... it just feels so overwhelming sometimes.

feel like I’m not living up to expectations
get down on myself when I think about failing
